_comment: Browser-demo fixture for the layer-set + crossfade refactor (post-FE-arch-review of 14333c9). Two items: an image (5s dwell) followed by an audio item with cinematic visualizer. Each item carries display_directives:[cross_fade_transitions], so behavior.transition resolves to 'crossfade'. The mountItem refactor builds the new layer-set BEFORE tearing down the old one; the OLD wrapper opacity-ramps from 1 to 0 over 800ms while the new layer-set sits at full opacity above it. This is the broadcasting feel — tuning between channels, not loading a new page.
name: Demo — Crossfade Program
description: Image → audio cinematic, with crossfade between items.
